string 2: Dang... I can't let it end like this...!
{next}What's wrong, Hagurumon?
{next}Nice palette swap...
{end}[I should leave it alone.]

I'm not Hagurumon! That's the last Digimon I'd
ever wanna be mistaken for!

I'm not a color variant of Hagurumon! Look closer!
I'm totally different!

*sigh* I can't face my master like this. What should I
do...?

How rude you are! I'll have you know I'm Solarmon,
trusted aide of Master Bearmon!

...But I haven't lived up to my master's expectations
yet. I can't do anything right!

...Wait. I can't hang around here forever.
No, where I need to be is Central Tower!
So you guys came, too, huh? Shh! Don't talk so loud.
{next}Why're you hiding here?
{next}Did you find a Parrotmon plume?
{next}Oh, I get it! You must be hiding in fear.

I-I'm not hiding! Any job done right starts with
observation.

P-Please... That's an easy task for a guy like me!
I'm sure I'll find one real soon.

...Uh, what? I don't catch your meaning.
Because I am most definitely not scared!

I came to find a Parrotmon plume on orders
from Master Bearmon.

See all the sparkly stuff scattered around?
There's gotta be a Parrotmon plume in there.

But with the world's worst timing, Titans have shown up.
Can you help me find one?
{next}Sure. Happy to help.
{next}Are all those shiny things feathers?
{end}No can do. I'm too busy right now.
How agreeable of you. All right. I'll do my part, too.

No, not all of them. There's some different stuff
mixed in there, too.

Well, not much I can do about that. Come see me
again once you finish your tasks!

Okay, you're in charge of finding the plume.
Watch out for the Titans. I'll be on lookout.

...What? I-I'm not scared! I'm staying put!
Lookout is an important job, too, you know!

Now, c'mon. Less talk, more work. Make sure you
find that feather!

It's a Parrotmon... plume-shaped candy wrapper.
This belongs in the trash!
It's a Parrotmon... plume-replica feather quill pen!
It's a Parrotmon... plume lookalike from another Digimon!
It's a Parrotmon... turd! Was there no restroom nearby?
There's something on the ground here.
Did you find a Parrotmon plume?! Okay, hand it over.

In return, I'll give you one of the items I found.
It's a good deal for you!

Aren't you glad we teamed up? I did most of the work,
but I won't forget your help.

Anyway, I'm going to report back to my master.
See ya later!

Hehehe. We got a Parrotmon plume and gained a
fearless follower, besides.
Things are going good, huh, Big Bro!

They sure are! It's time we resumed our hunt for
PlatinumNumemon's jewelry in the sewers!
Yay!
The wind is in our favor! All right, let's do this!
I'll follow you to the end of Iliad, Master!
...Don't you say anything funny, okay?
Well? Done with your tasks? Let's find that feather!
{next}Sure thing.
{end}Not yet.

I see, I see. That eager for my help, are you? Guess I have
no choice!

How can anyone be that busy? Come back after you've finished
your tasks, but hurry up!
